taxonomy: Racosperma mathuataense is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The classification of Racosperma mathuataense includes its binomial nomenclature, which consists of the genus name Racosperma and the species name mathuataense. This plant is also known by its synonym Acacia mathuataense. The classification further categorizes it under the kingdom Plantae.
